untranslatable_reason: Signal requires supply-demand ratio analysis (2.5 sigma extremes) and thesis-based fundamental analysis which are not available in the allowed technical indicators list. The core logic depends on supply/demand fundamentals and sector cyclical phase identification, neither of which can be expressed using only price/volume-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using price_pos_20 (Donchian position) as a stand-in for extreme supply-demand conditions, and rsi_14 as proxy for relative strength exit threshold (75th percentile). However, this translation loses the fundamental thesis-based entry logic and supply-demand extremity requirement that are central to the signal. A proper implementation would require custom supply-demand ratio calculations and fundamental data inputs not available in the allowed indicator set.
